details.reason: Activity 'com.bikecompartilhada.MainActivity' has an intent-filter but no explicit android:exported attribute. On API < 31 this defaults to exported=true. No permission guard found — potentially accessible by any app.

issue: exported component handles sensitive intent actions

issue: deep-link activity with custom URI scheme and no permission

details.reason: Activity 'com.bikecompartilhada.MainActivity' registers the custom URI scheme 'bikeitau://' without a permission guard. Any app can trigger this activity by crafting an Intent with a matching URI.
